announcement.title: 🎄 Year-end change freeze in effect — celebrate by deploying nothing
announcement.body: Seven full days of 2x rewards. Every team is technically on-call but nothing is allowed to break per executive order. Holiday gem bundle on the Shop tab. Happy holidays from the burnout warriors.

shop.title: Big Red Box
shop.description: Year-end blowout: 3000 💎 gems, 300 ✦ shards, 15 🎫 access cards. One-time per account.
